name: openport
description: OpenPort Protocol reference runtime for safe AI agent access to web application data and actions

scripts.build: npm run build:contracts && npm run build:core && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.build:all: npm run build:core && npm run build
scripts.build:reference: npm run build:core && npm --prefix apps/reference-server run build
scripts.build:api: bash scripts/with-modern-node.sh npm run build:contracts && bash scripts/with-modern-node.sh npm run build:core && bash scripts/with-modern-node.sh npm --prefix apps/api run build
scripts.build:web: bash scripts/with-modern-node.sh npm run build:contracts && bash scripts/with-modern-node.sh npm --prefix apps/web run build
scripts.install:product: npm run install:contracts && npm run install:core && npm run install:reference && npm run install:api && npm run install:web
scripts.dev:reference: bash scripts/with-modern-node.sh npm run build:core && bash scripts/with-modern-node.sh npm --prefix apps/reference-server run dev
scripts.dev:api: bash scripts/with-modern-node.sh npm run build:contracts && bash scripts/with-modern-node.sh npm run build:core && bash scripts/with-modern-node.sh npm --prefix apps/api run dev
scripts.dev:web: bash scripts/with-modern-node.sh npm run build:contracts && bash scripts/with-modern-node.sh npm --prefix apps/web run dev
scripts.start:reference: bash scripts/with-modern-node.sh npm --prefix apps/reference-server run start
scripts.start:api: bash scripts/with-modern-node.sh npm --prefix apps/api run start
scripts.start:web: bash scripts/with-modern-node.sh npm --prefix apps/web run start
scripts.compose:config: npm run env:product && docker compose -f compose/docker-compose.yml config
scripts.compose:build: npm run env:product && docker compose -f compose/docker-compose.yml build api web reference-server
scripts.compose:up: npm run env:product && docker compose -f compose/docker-compose.yml up -d --build

author: Accentrust and the OpenPort authors
